age.long_description: Age group, based on age in current years.

epic_n_ed_opioid.long_name: Number of patients in the ED for opioid overdose
epic_n_ed_opioid.short_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department for opioid overdose.
epic_n_ed_opioid.long_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department with an opioid overdose diagnosis. Data from Epic Cosmos. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_rate_ed_opioid.long_name: Opioid overdose rate per 100,000 ED patients
epic_rate_ed_opioid.short_description: Number of opioid overdoses per 100,000 ED patients.
epic_rate_ed_opioid.long_description: Rate of opioid overdose ED encounters per 100,000 all-cause ED encounters. Data from Epic Cosmos. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_n_ed_firearm.long_name: Number of patients in the ED for firearm injury
epic_n_ed_firearm.short_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department for a firearm injury.
epic_n_ed_firearm.long_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department with an initial firearm injury diagnosis. Data from Epic Cosmos. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_rate_ed_firearm.long_name: Firearm injury rate per 100,000 ED patients
epic_rate_ed_firearm.short_description: Number of firearm injuries per 100,000 ED patients.
epic_rate_ed_firearm.long_description: Rate of firearm injury ED encounters per 100,000 all-cause ED encounters. Data from Epic Cosmos. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_n_ed_heat.long_name: Number of patients in the ED for heat-related illness
epic_n_ed_heat.short_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department for a heat-related illness.
epic_n_ed_heat.long_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department with a heat-related illness diagnosis. Data from Epic Cosmos. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_rate_ed_heat.long_name: Heat-related illness rate per 100,000 ED patients
epic_rate_ed_heat.short_description: Number of heat-related illnesses per 100,000 ED patients.
epic_rate_ed_heat.long_description: Rate of heat-related illness ED encounters per 100,000 all-cause ED encounters. Data from Epic Cosmos. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

suppressed_opioid.long_name: Suppression flag for opioid overdose ED count
suppressed_opioid.short_description: Indicates whether the opioid overdose count was suppressed and imputed.
suppressed_opioid.long_description: Due to privacy protections, counts of 10 or fewer are suppressed and imputed as 5. This flag is 1 when the underlying opioid overdose ED count (epic_n_ed_opioid) was suppressed, 0 otherwise.

suppressed_firearm.long_name: Suppression flag for firearm injury ED count
suppressed_firearm.short_description: Indicates whether the firearm injury count was suppressed and imputed.
suppressed_firearm.long_description: Due to privacy protections, counts of 10 or fewer are suppressed and imputed as 5. This flag is 1 when the underlying firearm injury ED count (epic_n_ed_firearm) was suppressed, 0 otherwise.

suppressed_heat.long_name: Suppression flag for heat-related illness ED count
suppressed_heat.short_description: Indicates whether the heat-related illness count was suppressed and imputed.
suppressed_heat.long_description: Due to privacy protections, counts of 10 or fewer are suppressed and imputed as 5. This flag is 1 when the underlying heat-related illness ED count (epic_n_ed_heat) was suppressed, 0 otherwise.

heat_ed_patients.long_name: Number of county-level patients in the ED for heat-related illness
heat_ed_patients.short_description: Number of patients presenting to the emergency department for a heat-related illness, by county.
heat_ed_patients.long_description: Annual county-level count of patients presenting to the emergency department with a heat-related illness diagnosis. Data from Epic Cosmos. County-level data may have high missingness in some states. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

total_ed_patients.long_name: Number of county-level all-cause ED patients
total_ed_patients.short_description: Total number of all-cause emergency department patients in the county, used as the denominator for heat-related illness rates.
total_ed_patients.long_description: Annual county-level count of all-cause emergency department encounters, used as the denominator for the county heat-related illness incidence rate. Data from Epic Cosmos. County-level data may have high missingness in some states.

heat_ed_incidence.long_name: County heat-related illness rate per 100,000 ED patients
heat_ed_incidence.short_description: Number of heat-related illnesses per 100,000 all-cause ED patients, by county.
heat_ed_incidence.long_description: Annual county-level rate of heat-related illness ED encounters per 100,000 all-cause ED encounters. Data from Epic Cosmos. County-level data may have high missingness in some states. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

heat_suppressed.long_name: Suppression flag for county heat-related illness ED count
heat_suppressed.short_description: Indicates whether the county heat-related illness count was suppressed and imputed.
heat_suppressed.long_description: Due to privacy protections, counts of 10 or fewer are suppressed and imputed as 5. This flag is 1 when the underlying county heat-related illness ED count (heat_ed_patients) was suppressed, 0 otherwise.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'
